ddls:
CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "citizen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citizen making the submission */,
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the initiative related to the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of the submission */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Time of the submission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the submission (e.g., Open, In Progress, Closed) */,
  "assigned_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department assigned to resolve the submission */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Urgency level of the submission */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_citizen_id FOREIGN KEY ("citizen_id") REFERENCES citizens ("citizen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiative_id") REFERENCES initiatives ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assigned_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citizens" (
  "citizen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citizen */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the citizen */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the citizen */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the citizen */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the citizen */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the citizen registered */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citizen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initiative */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the initiative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initiative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the initiative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the initiative */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the initiative is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of the update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who made the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., progress, resolution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES staff_members ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_updates_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_members" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the staff member belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member joined the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_members_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "next_step" TEXT /* Next action required for the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the notification is related to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Email, SMS) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES staff_members ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citizen_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the feedback is related to */,
  "citizen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citizen providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback submission */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the citizen (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the citizen */,
  "response_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a response is required for the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizen_feedback_citizen_id FOREIGN KEY ("citizen_id") REFERENCES citizens ("citizen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizen_feedback_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "total_submissions" INTEGER /* Total number of submissions received on this date */,
  "resolved_submissions" INTEGER /* Number of submissions that have been resolved */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time in days for submissions */,
  "average_resolution_time" REAL /* Average time taken to resolve submissions in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Staff, Citizen) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role association */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the staff member */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment took effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff_members ("staff_id")
)
